column.displayName: 已过账(质量结论已回写业务单据)
column.name: posted

column.displayName: 已过账(报废处置已生成凭证)
column.name: posted

column.displayName: 关联退货单号(RETURN 处置编排退货域后登记)
column.name: returnCode

column.displayName: 违反的判异规则(逗号分隔)
column.name: violatedRules

column.displayName: 组内标准差 σ̂=R̄/d2(用于 Cp/Cpk)
column.name: withinStdDev
